records.ety: [F. productif, L. productivus fit for prolongation.]

defs: Having the quality or power of producing; yielding or furnishing results; as, productive soil; productive enterprises; productive labor, that which increases the number or amount of products.
Bringing into being; causing to exist; producing; originative; as, an age productive of great men; a spirit productive of heroic achievements.
quotes: And kindle with thy own productive fire.
This is turning nobility into a principle of virtue, and making it productive of merit.

defs: Producing, or able to produce, in large measure; fertile; profitable.
